entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange on Kaia providing token swaps, V3 liquidity pools, and farming functions.
entity.notes: HEI models DragonSwap V2 and V3 source rows as one exchange entity. Current first-party website and documentation describe DragonSwap as a Kaia DEX with swap, liquidity, and farming functionality.

evidence.title: DragonSwap Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies DragonSwap as a decentralized exchange in the Kaia ecosystem and describes swap, liquidity, and farming functionality.

evidence.title: DragonSwap official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes swap, pools, and dashboard surfaces and describes DragonSwap as an AMM-based DEX on Kaia.

evidence.title: DragonSwap discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry exposes V2 and V3 Kaia rows; HEI consolidates them into one DragonSwap entity.
